bio.es: Creador del Test-Driven Development (TDD) y de Extreme Programming (XP), metodologías que transformaron la forma en que escribimos software. Firmante original del Manifiesto Ágil y autor de libros fundamentales como 'Test Driven Development: By Example'. Su mantra 'Make it work, make it right, make it fast' es un pilar del desarrollo profesional.
bio.en: Creator of Test-Driven Development (TDD) and Extreme Programming (XP), methodologies that transformed how we write software. Original signatory of the Agile Manifesto and author of fundamental books like 'Test Driven Development: By Example'. His mantra 'Make it work, make it right, make it fast' is a pillar of professional development.
